trip.name: UK Road Trip 2027
trip.subtitle: Singapore to Britain and back
trip.notes: The travel dates and route are fixed. Hotels, attractions, restaurants, flight details and reservation references remain provisional until confirmed.

rules.title: Keep left
rules.detail: Drive on the left and keep to the left-hand lane on multi-lane roads unless overtaking or signs direct otherwise.

rules.title: Read every speed sign
rules.detail: For cars, national limits are generally 60 mph on single carriageways and 70 mph on dual carriageways and motorways. Always follow posted limits.

rules.title: Seat belts for every occupant
rules.detail: Use a seat belt whenever one is fitted and ensure each passenger has their own belted seat.

rules.title: No hand-held phone use
rules.detail: Set navigation before moving and stop safely before making changes.

rules.title: Move to relative safety
rules.detail: For a breakdown, leave the live carriageway when possible, use hazard lights and follow motorway emergency guidance.

tubePlan.paymentNote: Tube routes are provisional. Recheck fares, closures, disruptions and step-free availability with TfL before each journey.

journeys.accessibility: Check current step-free status with TfL.
Verify lift availability and airline terminal before departure.
journeys.notes: Provisional airport route if the final London hotel is near Paddington.

notes.title: Fixed route
notes.body: Singapore, London Heathrow, Stonehenge, Bristol, Cotswolds, Windermere, Edinburgh, St Andrews, York, Bicester Village, London, Singapore.

notes.title: Provisional bookings
notes.body: Do not treat any hotel, attraction or restaurant in this database as confirmed until its status and reference are updated.

notes.title: Long driving days
notes.body: Protect extra time for the Cotswolds to Windermere, St Andrews to York, and York to London driving days.
